jd_text: Job Description At BNY, our culture allows us to run our company better and enables employees’ growth and success. As a leading global financial services company at the heart of the global financial system, we influence nearly 20% of the world’s investible assets. Every day, our teams harness cutting-edge AI and breakthrough technologies to collaborate with clients, driving transformative solutions that redefine industries and uplift communities worldwide. Recognized as a top destination for innovators, BNY is where bold ideas meet advanced technology and exceptional talent. Together, we power the future of finance – and this is what is all about. Join us and be part of something extraordinary. We’re seeking a future team member for the role of Product Manager to join our Custody team. This role is located in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia In this role, you’ll make an impact in the following ways: Product Strategy & Ownership Own the end‑to‑end product roadmap for the middle east, aligned to firm‑wide platform and regional growth priorities Define product vision, scope, and success metrics for MENA custody capabilities, including onboarding, settlement, safekeeping, corporate actions, and reporting Market & Regulatory Engagement Act as the primary product interface with local market infrastructure and regulators Translate local regulatory, membership, and technical requirements into clear product and delivery plans Partner with Legal, Compliance, and Risk to ensure ongoing regulatory adherence and change management Delivery & Execution Work with cross‑platform engineering and operations teams to translate requirements into prioritized backlogs and delivery milestones Support quarterly planning with clear capacity, dependency, and risk articulation Stakeholder & Client Focus Collaborate with internal stakeholders across the Enterprise including Commercial teams to align client demand to capabilities Incorporate client and market feedback into product enhancements and roadmap evolution Clearly communicate product status, risks, and dependencies to senior stakeholders To be successful in this role, we’re seeking the following: Product management experience in custody, securities services, or post‑trade domains Direct experience with MENA capital markets, custody models, or market infrastructure Strong understanding of custody operating models, settlement flows, asset servicing, and market connectivity Proven experience working with regulators, or market utilities Demonstrated ability to lead complex cross‑functional delivery in regulated environments At BNY, our culture speaks for itself, check out the latest BNY news at: BNY Newsroom BNY LinkedIn Here’s a Few Of Our Recent Awards America’s Most Innovative Companies, Fortune, 2025 World’s Most Admired Companies, Fortune 2025 “Most Just Companies”, Just Capital and CNBC, 2025 Our Benefits And Rewards BNY offers highly competitive compensation, benefits, and wellbeing programs rooted in a strong culture of excellence and our pay-for-performance philosophy. We provide access to flexible global resources and tools for your life’s journey. Focus on your health, foster your personal resilience, and reach your financial goals as a valued member of our team, along with generous paid leaves, including paid volunteer time, that can support you and your family through moments that matter. BNY is an Equal Employment Opportunity/Affirmative Action Employer - Underrepresented racial and ethnic groups/Females/Individuals with Disabilities/Protected Veterans.
